mainText:
PROMO: Bank of Entitlement - "Where being entitled has its privileges! Get the royal treatment you deserve!"

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, picture this: I stroll into the Bank of Entitlement, and what do I see? A line. A line of actual people, waiting! Can you believe it? I don't wait, darling, I'm too important for that. I saunter up to the front, my sunglasses gleaming, and demand immediate service. The nerve of them to even suggest otherwise! Well, let's just say, after a symphony of wails and my impeccable dramatics, they not only served me first but threw in a foot massage as an apology. That's right, folks. My entitlement paid off once again.
